title: Principal Investigator Handbooks — Index
content: Five Principal Investigator's Handbooks written to assist Morgan State University faculty and employees with the development of proposals for sponsored projects and management of their awards. Each handbook PDF is listed below with its effective date and direct download URL. (1) PI Handbook 1: General Principles — effective 2022-09-06 — https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/PI/PI%20Handbook%201%20General%20Principles%202022-09-06.pdf — provides an overview of sponsored programs lifecycle and overarching compliance principles. (2) PI Handbook 2: Budget Preparation — effective 2023-09-05 — https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/PI/PI%20Handbook%202%20Budget%20Preparation%202023-09-05.pdf — walks you through the process of creating and managing a budget for a sponsored project. (3) PI Handbook 3: Grant-Related Processes — effective 2025-02-24 — https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/PI/PI%20Handbook%203%20Grant-Related%20Processes%202025-02-24.pdf — guides users through pre- and post-award processes and explains roles and timeline for managing sponsored projects at MSU. (4) PI Handbook 4: Research Facilities & Resources — effective 2022-09-06 — https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/PI/PI%20Handbook%204-Research%20Facilities%20and%20Resources%202022-09-6.pdf — provides an overview of the research capabilities and resources at MSU, including major research centers. (5) PI Handbook 5: Policies & Guidelines — effective 2024-07-01 — https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/PI/2024-07-01_PIHandbook5.pdf — compiles research-related policies including Conflicts of Interest, Misconduct, Export Control, and Cost Sharing.
